summary: Iteration 65: Verified 4 features - batch stamping, case hearings, public profile content, and scan mode dropdown. All features working correctly with 100% backend test pass rate.

minor.issue: Frontend CasesTab.jsx line 145 calls /api/practice/calendar/events which doesn't exist - should be /api/practice/events. Calendar sync fails silently with fallback toast message.

integration_issues.issue: CasesTab.jsx handleAddHearing function calls incorrect endpoint /api/practice/calendar/events instead of /api/practice/events. Hearing creation works but calendar sync fails silently.

action_items: Fix CasesTab.jsx line 145: change '/api/practice/calendar/events' to '/api/practice/events' for proper calendar sync
critical_code_review_comments: CasesTab.jsx calls wrong endpoint for calendar events - should use /api/practice/events instead of /api/practice/calendar/events
seed_data_creation: Created test cases and hearings via API during testing - cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features verified: 1) Batch stamps endpoint /api/documents/batch-stamps works and returns batch history list. 2) Case hearings POST to /api/practice/cases/{case_id}/hearings works - Add Hearing button visible in case detail modal. 3) Public profile at /advocate/{user_id} displays all populated content (bio, education, practice areas, experience, achievements, memberships, bar admissions). 4) Scan mode dropdown exists in DocumentStampPage.jsx lines 2028-2036 with options: Document (Gray), Color, Black & White. The dropdown appears when showScanPreview is true (after scanning documents).

batch_stamps.notes: Returns list of batch stamp records with batch_id, created_at, file_count fields

case_hearings.notes: Hearing creation works. Add Hearing button visible in case detail modal. Calendar sync has minor bug (wrong endpoint call).

public_profile.notes: All profile sections populated: bio, education (2 entries), practice areas (5 areas), experience, achievements (2), memberships (3), bar admissions (2), languages

scan_mode_dropdown.notes: Dropdown renders when showScanPreview is true (after adding scanned pages)
